Our Community

Life at FBC Shannon

From Sunday worship to youth camp to fall festivals — we do life together.

Worship From Anywhere

Watch Live

We stream every Sunday at 10:00 AM on Facebook. Watch right here or join us on our Facebook page.

Live Sundays · 10 AM

Worship With Us Online

Can't make it in person? Tune in every Sunday morning and worship with your FBC family from wherever you are.

After service, the recording stays on Facebook so you can watch or share anytime.

What's Coming Up

Upcoming Events

Stay connected with what's happening at FBC Shannon.

Every Sun
☀️
9 AM · 10 AM
5 PM · 6 PM

Sunday Services

Sunday School at 9 AM, Morning Worship at 10 AM, Bible Study at 5 PM, and Evening Worship at 6 PM. Nursery provided at all services.

Every Wed
🌙
5:30 PM Meal
6:00 PM Service

Wednesday Night

Meal for kids and youth at 5:30 PM, followed by service and classes for all ages at 6:00 PM.

Generosity

Give to
God's Work

Your generosity supports our church family, our community, and missions work near and far. Every gift matters.

"Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

2 Corinthians 9:7
💛

Online Giving

Give securely online — one-time or recurring. Every gift goes directly to the work of FBC Shannon.

Get Involved

Our Ministries

There's a place for everyone at FBC Shannon — from the nursery to the choir loft.

👶
Nursery
Safe, loving nursery care provided at every service so parents can worship with peace of mind.
🧒
Children's Ministry
Fun, Bible-based classes and activities for kids of all ages, Sunday mornings and Wednesday nights.
🔥
Youth Group
An active, Christ-centered youth group with weekly meetings, events, and summer camp (FUGE!).
🎵
Choir
Our choir leads worship every Sunday. Rehearsals at 4:00 PM — all voices welcome!
📖
Bible Study
Sunday School classes at 9 AM and Sunday evening at 5 PM, with classes for every age group.
🍽️
Wednesday Night
Meal for kids and youth at 5:30 PM, followed by service and classes at 6:00 PM for all ages.
